decks.notes: This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield for a devastating combo. Bitter Triumph and Restless Reef help with the reanimation process, while cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex provide powerful threats to bring back. Day of Black Sun can clear the board to set up a big reanimation play. The deck also includes disruption with Duress and Deadly Cover-Up to deal with opposing threats. Overall, this deck focuses on quickly reanimating big threats to overwhelm the opponent.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence and tempo advantage by utilizing low-cost creatures and spells. By playing aggressively and efficiently, the deck aims to pressure the opponent's life total while maintaining card advantage through card draw and removal spells. The inclusion of evasion abilities like flying on creatures such as Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off allows for damage to be dealt to the opponent uncontested. The deck also contains some control elements like Burst Lightning and Torch the Tower to deal with threats on the opponent's side of the board.

This mono green aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient creatures and pump spells, utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves to ramp into threats like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Ba Sing Se. Utilizing cards like Royal Treatment and Archdruid's Charm to control the board and push through damage, this deck aims to end the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. With a focus on consistency and aggression, this deck seeks to curve out and apply pressure from the early turns, ultimately overwhelming the opponent before they can respond.

The deck focuses on aggressive tactics and fast-paced gameplay, utilizing creatures with powerful abilities to overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of mana acceleration, versatile spells, and potent creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Craterhoof Behemoth, the deck aims to quickly establish a strong board presence and deal substantial damage to the opponent. Additionally, cards like Nature's Rhythm and Gene Pollinator provide additional support and synergy to create a formidable aggro strategy. By combining efficient creatures and disruptive spells, the deck seeks to maintain pressure and take control of the game early on.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence and dealing damage to the opponent using aggressive Boros creatures and burn spells. Cards like Shocking Sharpshooter and Fanatical Firebrand provide early pressure while Warleader's Call and Inspiring Vantage help maintain aggression. The deck also includes versatile removal spells like Torch the Tower and Burst Lightning to clear the way for attacks. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Ojer Axonil, Deepest Might and Raphael, Tough Turtle provide additional threats and resilience. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and direct damage spells.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures and spells to quickly reduce the opponent's life total. By utilizing efficient card draw and bounce spells, the deck aims to maintain a steady flow of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan. With a mix of cheap creatures and burn spells, the deck can apply pressure early and finish the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. Additionally, the deck includes some counterspells and evasion abilities to protect its creatures and push through damage.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and spells, using the UR (Blue-Red) color combination. The deck focuses on generating card advantage through card draw and bouncing effects, while also utilizing cheap removal spells to control the board. With a mix of evasive creatures like Elusive Otter and burst damage spells like Burst Lightning, the deck aims to apply constant pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of alternate win conditions like Octopus Form and Eddymurk Crab provides additional versatility and unpredictability.

The main concept of this deck is to control the opponent's board with counterspells and removal while maintaining card advantage through spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck also utilizes creatures like Hearth Elemental and Eddymurk Crab to pressure the opponent while casting powerful finishers like Glacial Dragonhunt. Riverpyre Verge and Winternight Stories provide additional card advantage and mana fixing, allowing the deck to consistently cast its spells and overwhelm the opponent with a variety of threats.

This deck focuses on using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By utilizing cards like Spell Pierce and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's strategy and Winternight Stories for card advantage, the deck aims to maintain board control and stall the game until it can close out with powerful finishers like Hearth Elemental and Into the Flood Maw. Additionally, cards like Abandon Attachments and Get Out provide additional utility and flexibility in different situations.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a fast-paced offensive strategy, utilizing aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The deck aims to control the board early on with removal spells like Shock and Burst Lightning, while building up a strong board presence with creatures like Hearthborn Battler and Nova Hellkite. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Zhao, the Moon Slayer and Tokka & Rahzar, Terrible Twos, allows for a strong finish if the game goes longer than expected.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly controlling the board and dealing damage to the opponent through a combination of cheap spells, creatures with evasion, and card draw. By utilizing bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Bounce Off, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Elusive Otter, this deck aims to keep the pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage with Opt and Sleight of Hand. The inclusion of burst damage spells like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent allows for potential quick finishes, making this deck a formidable force in the aggro archetype.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using cards like "Kona, Rescue Beastie" and "Formidable Speaker" to ultimately cast "Omniscience". Once Omniscience is in play, the player can cast spells like "Uthros, Titanic Godcore" and "Ashling, Rekindled" for free, overwhelming the opponent with powerful creatures and spells. The deck also includes control elements like "Spell Snare" and "Spider-Sense" to protect the combo pieces. The goal is to establish board presence and dominate the game with powerful plays enabled by Omniscience.

Mono Green Aggro focuses on putting pressure on opponents early in the game by playing low cost, efficient creatures and utilizing various combat tricks to maintain board presence and deal damage quickly. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to accelerate mana production and deploy threats quickly. This archetype prioritizes a proactive playstyle and aims to win the game before the opponent can stabilize and mount a defense.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of spells and creatures from the Izzet guild. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments, Burst Lightning, and Spell Pierce, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage through card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck also includes powerful threats like Eddymurk Crab, Hearth Elemental, and Glacial Dragonhunt to apply pressure and eventually win the game. Overall, the deck focuses on controlling the board and outlasting the opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures with abilities that disrupt the opponent's strategy, such as Dream Beavers and Spyglass Siren. The key strategy is to quickly build up a board presence while controlling the opponent's resources with cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Tragic Trajectory. The inclusion of cards like Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Cecil, Dark Knight provide additional threats and power to overwhelm the opponent. The deck also features cards that provide card advantage and resilience, such as Enduring Curiosity and Soulstone Sanctuary. Overall, this deck aims to win through efficient aggression and disruption.

This deck focuses on using counterspells and targeted removal to control the game, while also utilizing card draw and mana acceleration to stay ahead of opponents. With a mix of cheap and efficient spells, as well as creatures with utility abilities, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan and then finish them off with powerful threats like Glacial Dragonhunt and Hearth Elemental. The inclusion of cards like Abandon Attachments and Winternight Stories helps to recycle resources and maintain board presence, giving the deck a strong control and tempo advantage.
